sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '1992-02-15');
SELECT id, millennium(event_date) AS century FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2005-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE millennium(event_date) = 2;
